entries.openingLines: Alice was beginning to get very tired of sitting by her sister on the bank, and of having nothing to do.
entries.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
entries.author: Lewis Carroll

entries.openingLines: When Mary Lennox was sent to Misselthwaite Manor to live with her uncle everybody said she was the most disagreeable-looking child ever seen.
entries.title: The Secret Garden
entries.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett

entries.openingLines: Lyra and her daemon moved through the darkening hall, taking care to keep to one side, out of sight of the kitchen.
entries.title: The Golden Compass
entries.author: Philip Pullman
